userText: We need a person who can explains the problem; People who write code every day will being stronger.
correctedText: We need a person who can explain this problem. People who write code every day become better developers.
generalAdvice: 定语从句结构已经稳定，下一步必须清理动词链：can 后面用原形；表达长期变化优先用 become/get better，不要写 will being。

issues.note: 情态动词 can 后面误用了第三人称单数形式 explains。
issues.suggestion: 看到 can/could/will/should 后，立刻把后面的动词还原：can explain, can fix, will be。

issues.note: 把 will 和 being 直接连用，写成 will being stronger。
issues.suggestion: will 后面用动词原形：will be。表达习惯带来的变化，更自然用 simple present：People who ... become/get better.

issues.note: become stronger 对程序员能力提升能懂，但 become better developers 更自然具体。
issues.suggestion: 表达开发能力变强时，优先说 become better developers 或 get better at coding。
